Which attribute of the <form> tag is used to tell the browser what page to request as soon as the user submits the form?

column5: Correct. The action= " attribute tells the browser what page to jump to when the submit button is pressed."
This is not a valid attribute for the <form> tag

The method= " attribute describes how the values from the form will be transmitted to the server. The value of this attribute is either GET (tack the values on the end of the URL of the request) or POST (pack the values up in a 'suitcase' and send them to the server along with the action URL."
The id= " attribute is the unique name for this control."
